/usr/bin/ar qc libsdr_core.a CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/hardware/PlutoSDR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/modem/Modem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/modem/AdaptiveModem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/framing/Framer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/framing/Deframer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/dsp/RRCFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/dsp/AGC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/dsp/TimingSync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/dsp/CostasLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/dsp/FFTSpectrum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/fec/ReedSolomon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/crypto/AESCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/transport/TUNTAPDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/transport/UDPSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sdr_core.dir/stats/LinkStats.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsdr_core.a
